Conversation Lifecycle State Machine

One explicit per-mind machine keeps the selected history row, active session id, and rendered chat messages in sync: conversationViewByMind[mindId].
selection/history async hydration safe to render failure bug prevention

Transitions, in order

1
SET_CONVERSATION_HISTORY

Loads the sidebar and records the active session. If that session changed, the view becomes idle.

2
CONVERSATION_HYDRATING

Starts resume for the selected session and stores pendingSessionId as the guard.

3
RESUME_CONVERSATION

Moves to ready, but only for the currently pending session. Otherwise the result is ignored as stale.

4
CONVERSATION_HYDRATE_FAILED

Returns to idle for the same pending session and stores the error for diagnostics.

5
ADD_ASSISTANT_MESSAGE

Binds locally-created messages to the active conversation and sets streaming: true.

6
CHAT_EVENT done/error/timeout

Keeps the view ready and clears streaming.

7
SET_MODEL_SWITCHING

Toggles a per-mind flag; it does not compete with lifecycle state.

8
NEW_CONVERSATION

Clears local content for the target mind and returns to idle; the service result supplies the new active session.

Important UI behavior: while status is hydrating, the chat pane shows a loading state instead of the empty welcome screen. That prevents “history row selected, blank chat area” drift.
